productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women's Pink Black Print T-shirt
description: CompositionPink round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the front FittingRegularWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Bring out the trendy fashionista side of you with this pink graphic tee from the Power Puff range of jealous 21.
